creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dries Michiels from comment #29)
I also think it's fine to get in the tree.  After reading the comments in this one and https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=232935 , the patch in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19130 fixes both issues, do I understand correctly?

Also, Maxime, could you do the final maintainer approval for the patch in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19130 ?
